title: 皐月賞の後に・魂は同じ色

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We took on the Satsuki Sho knowing we didn't
stand a chance, and unfortunately, we were
right...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Geez, that was some tussle...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I know I'm a pipsqueak, but even if I was a giant,
that woulda been a tough race.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
So this is Classic Triple Crown—the Satsuki Sho...
It really is somethin' else.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer! That was real rough, lemme tell ya...
choice_data_list:
It looks like you weren't the only one who had it
rough.

It looks like you weren't the only one who had it
rough.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Can't say I'm surprised. In a race this major,
standin' out works against ya...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
They'll mark ya, then no matter where ya go,
there they are. Still, haven't heard her
complainin'...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
There's more to her than glitz 'n glam... That's for
sure...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
City, you were great out there. That race really
put us through the wringer.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But that look tells me... you're not even thinkin'
about backin' down. That glint in your eye... It's
sparklin' brighter than your hair is.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
...That's right. People think I'm just some pretty
face, but I'm more than that.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
And you're not just some runt. You may be short,
but those guts of yours are on par with some of
the biggest stars.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, that's right. There's more to us than meets
the eye.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Now I can't wait to race you again! Just thinkin' about competin' with another hot-blooded racer's got my blood boilin'!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two nod, their gazes meeting as they regard
each other with fiery determination.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They may look nothing alike, but their souls burn
the same bright hue.
